   "source": [
    "# Tutorial 2 - Merge"
   ]
  },

   "metadata": {

   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "\n",
    "import pydpeet as eet\n",
    "\n",
    "eet.set_logging_style(\"ERROR\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "id": "3f12c4ffdb38129",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-01-30T19:33:54.249926800Z",
     "start_time": "2026-01-30T19:33:37.018251300Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "Datas = eet.read(config=\"neware_8_0_0_516\", input_path=r\"..\\..\\res\\raw\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "id": "e8a5513731df3239",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-01-30T19:33:54.920932900Z",
     "start_time": "2026-01-30T19:33:54.249926800Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 2000x600 with 4 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "fig, ax = plt.subplots(1, len(Datas), figsize=(5 * len(Datas), 6))\n",
    "\n",
    "for i, data in enumerate(Datas):\n",
    "    ax[i].plot(data[\"Test_Time[s]\"], data[\"Voltage[V]\"], label=f\"Data {i+1}\")\n",
    "    ax[i].set_title(f\"Data {i+1}\")\n",
    "    ax[i].set_xlabel(\"Time [s]\")\n",
    "    ax[i].set_ylabel(\"Voltage [V]\")\n",
    "    fig.tight_layout()"
   ]
  },

    "p = 0\n",
